categories.name: Maestro
categories.description: Intelligent coordinator and core workflow commands — init, plan, execute, verify, and lifecycle management

categories.name: Specification
categories.description: Project specifications, conventions, and codebase knowledge management

categories.name: Quality
categories.description: Testing, debugging, code review, refactoring, and quality assurance

categories.name: Management
categories.description: Project status, memory management, codebase documentation, and issue tracking

categories.name: Team Skills
categories.description: Multi-agent team collaboration skills for orchestrated parallel workflows

categories.name: Odyssey
categories.description: Long-running deep-cycle commands — exhaustive iteration with archaeology, fix, generalization, and knowledge persistence

categories.name: Learning
categories.description: Pattern extraction, guided reading, investigation, retrospectives, and multi-perspective analysis

categories.name: Wiki
categories.description: Knowledge graph management, connection discovery, and digest generation

categories.name: Scholar Skills
categories.description: Academic writing & research skills — paper writing, citation verification, experiment analysis, and rebuttal

categories.name: Meta Skills
categories.description: Skill tooling and prompt engineering — create, simplify, tune skills, generate prompts, and check delegation contracts

commands.name: maestro
commands.description: Intelligent coordinator — analyze intent + read project state → select optimal command chain → execute via Skill() or CLI delegate

commands.name: maestro-init
commands.description: Initialize project with auto state detection (empty/code/existing) — creates .workflow/ directory structure

commands.name: maestro-plan
commands.description: Explore, clarify, plan, check, and confirm a phase execution plan — produces plan.json with waves and task definitions

commands.name: maestro-execute
commands.description: Execute plan with wave-based parallel execution and atomic commits

commands.name: maestro-quick
commands.description: Execute a quick task with workflow guarantees but skip optional agents

commands.name: maestro-brainstorm
commands.description: Unified brainstorming with dual-mode operation — auto pipeline (multi-role synthesis) and single role analysis

commands.name: maestro-analyze
commands.description: Dual-layer analysis: macro (text) for requirement exploration with scope_verdict, micro (number) for phase-level 6-dimension deep analysis

commands.name: maestro-collab
commands.description: Multi-CLI collaborative analysis -- fan-out to multiple CLI tools, cross-verify, synthesize

commands.name: maestro-roadmap
commands.description: Interactive roadmap creation with iterative refinement

commands.name: maestro-impeccable
commands.description: Chain maestro-impeccable commands with intelligent routing and quality gate loops for automated UI production

commands.name: maestro-milestone-audit
commands.description: Audit current milestone for cross-phase integration gaps

commands.name: maestro-milestone-complete
commands.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next

commands.name: spec-setup
commands.description: Initialize system specs by scanning project structure and generating conventions

commands.name: spec-add
commands.description: Add a spec entry (bug, pattern, decision, or rule) to the appropriate specs file

commands.name: spec-load
commands.description: Load relevant specs and lessons for current context (used by agents before execution)

commands.name: spec-remove
commands.description: Remove a spec entry from a specs file by entry ID

commands.name: quality-review
commands.description: Tiered code review (quick/standard/deep) with parallel agents, severity classification, and auto-issue creation

commands.name: quality-test
commands.description: Conversational UAT with session persistence, auto-diagnosis, and gap-plan closure loop

commands.name: quality-auto-test
commands.description: Unified automated testing via CSV layer pipeline — generates, executes, and iterates tests from PRD specs, coverage gaps, or code exploration

commands.name: quality-debug
commands.description: Parallel hypothesis-driven debugging with UAT integration and structured root cause collection

commands.name: quality-integration-test
commands.description: [DEPRECATED] Merged into quality-auto-test. Use /quality-auto-test <phase> instead.

commands.name: quality-refactor
commands.description: Tech debt reduction with reflection-driven iteration

commands.name: quality-sync
commands.description: Sync codebase docs after code changes — traces git diff through component/feature/requirement impact chain

commands.name: manage-status
commands.description: Display project dashboard with phase progress, active tasks, and next steps

commands.name: manage-knowhow
commands.description: Manage memory entries — workflow memory (.workflow/knowhow/) and system memory (~/.claude/projects/*/memory/)

commands.name: manage-knowhow-capture
commands.description: Capture session memory (compact or tips) into .workflow/knowhow/ with JSON index

commands.name: manage-codebase-rebuild
commands.description: Full rebuild of codebase documentation — scans project, builds doc-index.json, generates all tech-registry and feature-maps

commands.name: manage-codebase-refresh
commands.description: Incremental refresh of codebase docs based on recent changes

commands.name: manage-issue
commands.description: Issue CRUD operations — create, query, update, close, and link issues to tasks

commands.name: manage-issue-discover
commands.description: Automated issue discovery — multi-perspective analysis or prompt-driven exploration

commands.name: maestro-amend
commands.description: Collect deficiency signals from workflow artifacts, sessions, and user reports, then generate overlays to amend workflow commands

commands.name: maestro-composer
commands.description: Semantic workflow composer — parse natural language into DAG of skill/CLI/agent nodes, auto-inject checkpoints, persist as reusable JSON template

commands.name: maestro-player
commands.description: Workflow template player — load JSON template, bind variables, execute DAG nodes in order, persist state at checkpoints, support resume

commands.name: maestro-update
commands.description: Interactive workflow migration — detect version, preview changes, apply upgrades

commands.name: maestro-fork
commands.description: Create a worktree for milestone-level parallel development, or sync existing worktree with main

commands.name: maestro-learn
commands.description: Learning coordinator — route intent to learn commands, execute single or multi-step chains

commands.name: maestro-link-coordinate
commands.description: Step-mode graph coordinator via maestro coordinate endpoint — executes chain nodes one by one with session tracking

commands.name: maestro-merge
commands.description: Two-phase merge of milestone worktree branch back — git merge first, scratch artifact sync only on success

commands.name: maestro-milestone-release
commands.description: Version bump, changelog generation, and git tag for a completed milestone

commands.name: maestro-overlay
commands.description: Create or edit a non-invasive overlay that augments existing slash commands based on natural-language intent

commands.name: learn-decompose
commands.description: Decompose code into cataloged design patterns, saving findings to specs and wiki

commands.name: learn-follow
commands.description: Guided follow-along reading of code or wiki entries, extracting patterns and building understanding

commands.name: learn-investigate
commands.description: Systematic question investigation with hypothesis testing, evidence logging, and 3-strike escalation

commands.name: learn-retro
commands.description: Unified retrospective — git activity metrics and decision quality evaluation with lens-based selection

commands.name: learn-second-opinion
commands.description: Multi-perspective analysis with review, challenge, and consult modes

commands.name: manage-harvest
commands.description: Extract knowledge from workflow artifacts and route to wiki / spec / issue stores

commands.name: manage-learn
commands.description: Capture, search, and review atomic learning insights and tips into .workflow/learning/lessons.jsonl

commands.name: manage-wiki
commands.description: Wiki knowledge graph management — health dashboard, orphan cleanup, entry search, and graph statistics

commands.name: quality-business-test
commands.description: [DEPRECATED] Merged into quality-auto-test (spec route). Use /quality-auto-test <phase> instead.

commands.name: quality-retrospective
commands.description: Multi-lens 复盘 of completed phase(s); routes insights to spec/note/issue stores and the lessons library

commands.name: wiki-connect
commands.description: Surface hidden connections in the wiki knowledge graph and suggest or apply new links

commands.name: wiki-digest
commands.description: Generate knowledge digest from wiki entries with theme clustering, gap analysis, and coverage heatmap

commands.name: maestro-tools-register
commands.description: Register tool specs — extract, generate, or optimize reusable process/tool definitions into .workflow/specs/tools.md

commands.name: maestro-tools-execute
commands.description: Load and execute tool specs by role or name — supports direct invocation by name or role-based recommendation

commands.name: maestro-ralph
commands.description: Closed-loop decision engine for the maestro workflow lifecycle — reads project state, infers position, builds adaptive chain, delegates execution

commands.name: maestro-ralph-execute
commands.description: Single-step executor for ralph (adaptive) and maestro (static) sessions — locate session, find next step, resolve args, execute, update, self-invoke next

commands.name: maestro-next
commands.description: Single-command recommendation engine — parses intent and project state, recommends one atomic command via routing-table scoring

commands.name: maestro-blueprint
commands.description: Generate formal specification package (Product Brief, PRD, Architecture, Epics) through 6-phase document chain with multi-CLI analysis

commands.name: maestro-grill
commands.description: Socratic stress-testing of plans, ideas, or requirements against codebase reality with adversarial questioning and code evidence verification

commands.name: maestro-swarm-workflow
commands.description: Parallel workflow accelerator — route intent to fixed Workflow scripts for multi-agent concurrent execution

commands.name: maestro-universal-workflow
commands.description: Dynamic adversarial workflow generator — scan library, match or generate, execute, persist

commands.name: maestro-companion
commands.description: Knowledge companion — side-car utility for task context loading, structured companion doc recording, insight capture, and skill routing

commands.name: maestro-guard
commands.description: Manage editing boundary restrictions — configure directory-level write boundaries enforced by the workflow-guard PreToolUse hook

commands.name: maestro-ui-codify
commands.description: Extract design system from code, generate reference package, persist as knowledge assets — 4-phase pipeline: validate, extract, package, knowhow

commands.name: security-audit
commands.description: OWASP Top 10 and STRIDE security auditing with supply chain analysis — three tiers: quick, standard, deep

commands.name: manage-drift-realign
commands.description: Detect and realign .workflow/ artifact drift against code reality after refactoring — git timeline + session history driven

commands.name: manage-knowledge-audit
commands.description: Audit and prune knowledge across spec/knowhow/artifact tri-store — detect contradictions, staleness, orphans; apply keep/deprecate/delete decisions

commands.name: odyssey-debug
commands.description: Long-running debug cycle — archaeology, diagnosis, fix, confirmation, generalization, discovery, and knowledge persistence

commands.name: odyssey-improve
commands.description: Long-running codebase improvement cycle — multi-dimensional audit, deep diagnosis, targeted fix, verify, generalize, and engineering knowledge persistence

commands.name: odyssey-planex
commands.description: Requirement-driven iterative cycle — plan, execute, strict verify, fix loop until acceptance criteria met

commands.name: odyssey-review-test-fix
commands.description: Deep review + fix cycle — archaeology, exploration, multi-dimensional review, targeted fix, generalization, discovery, and knowledge persistence

commands.name: odyssey-ui
commands.description: Long-running UI optimization cycle — visual survey, multi-dimensional audit, divergent exploration, fix, verify, generalize, and design knowledge persistence

claude_skills.name: team-lifecycle-v4
claude_skills.description: Full lifecycle team skill — plan, develop, test, review in one coordinated session with role-based beat model architecture

claude_skills.name: team-coordinate
claude_skills.description: Universal team coordination skill with dynamic role generation — analyze task → generate role-specs → dispatch → execute → deliver

claude_skills.name: team-executor
claude_skills.description: Lightweight session execution skill — resumes existing team sessions for pure execution via team-worker agents

claude_skills.name: team-testing
claude_skills.description: Multi-agent testing team — strategist → generator → executor → analyst with progressive L1/L2/L3 coverage and Generator-Critic loops

claude_skills.name: team-review
claude_skills.description: Multi-agent code review — scanner → reviewer → fixer with 4-dimension analysis (SEC/COR/PRF/MNT)

claude_skills.name: team-quality-assurance
claude_skills.description: Full closed-loop QA team — scout → strategist → generator → executor → analyst with discovery, testing, and full modes

claude_skills.name: team-tech-debt
claude_skills.description: Tech debt governance team — scanner → assessor → planner → executor → validator with 5 debt dimensions

claude_skills.name: codify-to-knowhow
claude_skills.description: Manifest-driven knowledge asset generator — converts any structured package into maestro knowhow + spec entries with ref linking

claude_skills.name: skill-iter-tune
claude_skills.description: Iterative skill tuning via execute-evaluate-improve feedback loop with two-tool pipeline (Claude + Gemini)

claude_skills.name: workflow-skill-designer
claude_skills.description: Meta-skill for designing orchestrator+phases structured workflow skills with progressive phase loading

claude_skills.name: team-arch-opt
claude_skills.description: Architecture optimization team — multi-role analysis, bottleneck identification, and refactoring of system architecture

claude_skills.name: team-brainstorm
claude_skills.description: Multi-role brainstorming team — generates diverse perspectives and synthesizes a converged solution

claude_skills.name: team-designer
claude_skills.description: Team skill scaffolding — designs and generates new team skill structures with role directories

claude_skills.name: team-frontend
claude_skills.description: Frontend development team — component-driven UI implementation with multi-role collaboration

claude_skills.name: team-frontend-debug
claude_skills.description: Frontend debugging team — Chrome DevTools-driven visual and runtime issue resolution

claude_skills.name: team-interactive-craft
claude_skills.description: Interactive component crafting team — builds interactive UI components with critique loops

claude_skills.name: team-issue
claude_skills.description: Issue resolution pipeline team — discovers, analyzes, fixes, and closes issues end-to-end

claude_skills.name: team-motion-design
claude_skills.description: Animation & motion design team — designs and implements UI motion and transition patterns

claude_skills.name: team-perf-opt
claude_skills.description: Performance optimization team — profiles, diagnoses, and fixes performance bottlenecks

claude_skills.name: team-planex
claude_skills.description: Plan-and-execute pipeline team — requirement-to-delivery closed loop driven by acceptance criteria

claude_skills.name: team-roadmap-dev
claude_skills.description: Roadmap-driven development team — phased milestone execution from a project roadmap

claude_skills.name: team-ui-polish
claude_skills.description: UI polish team — refines visual and interaction details for design quality

claude_skills.name: team-uidesign
claude_skills.description: Design tokens & audit team — manages design tokens and runs UI design audits

claude_skills.name: team-ultra-analyze
claude_skills.description: Deep collaborative analysis team — multi-perspective exhaustive codebase analysis

claude_skills.name: team-ux-improve
claude_skills.description: UX interaction team — identifies and fixes user-experience interaction issues

claude_skills.name: team-visual-a11y
claude_skills.description: Visual accessibility QA team — WCAG-compliant visual accessibility checks and fixes

claude_skills.name: scholar-anti-ai-writing
claude_skills.description: Remove AI writing patterns — detects and rewrites AI-typical phrasing for natural prose

claude_skills.name: scholar-citation-verify
claude_skills.description: Citation verification — checks references against source claims and contexts

claude_skills.name: scholar-experiment
claude_skills.description: Experiment analysis — analyzes, interprets, and visualizes experimental results

claude_skills.name: scholar-ideation
claude_skills.description: Research ideation — identifies research gaps and plans promising directions

claude_skills.name: scholar-latex-organizer
claude_skills.description: LaTeX organizer — cleans and restructures LaTeX project files and templates

claude_skills.name: scholar-publish
claude_skills.description: Post-acceptance preparation — camera-ready and submission material packaging

claude_skills.name: scholar-rebuttal-pro
claude_skills.description: Rebuttal Pro — crafts reviewer responses with CLI-assisted argument analysis

claude_skills.name: scholar-review
claude_skills.description: Paper review — reviews manuscripts and generates structured rebuttal responses

claude_skills.name: scholar-thesis-docx
claude_skills.description: Thesis Word formatting — formats thesis documents for Word submission

claude_skills.name: scholar-writing
claude_skills.description: End-to-end paper writing — repo to publication-ready LaTeX manuscript

claude_skills.name: skill-generator
claude_skills.description: Skill generator — creates new Claude Code skills with sequential or autonomous phase patterns

claude_skills.name: skill-simplify
claude_skills.description: Skill simplify — refactors and trims skills while preserving behavior via integrity checks

claude_skills.name: skill-tuning
claude_skills.description: Skill tuning — diagnoses and iteratively optimizes skill execution issues

claude_skills.name: prompt-generator
claude_skills.description: Prompt generator — generates or converts command, skill, and agent prompt files

claude_skills.name: delegation-check
claude_skills.description: Delegation check — validates delegation prompts against role definitions for boundary leaks
